native biological assembly contacts and ligand/metal coordination geometry before sealing

prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: The nucleoside binding site of Herpes simplex type 1 thymidine kinase analyzed by X-ray crystallography. Entity description: THYMIDINE KINASE. Organism: Human alphaherpesvirus 1 strain 17. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. V71 shard: V71A_BROAD_RCSB_NONREDUNDANT. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived membrane tendency high; no membrane topology without explicit E66 topology evidence; sequence-derived low complexity tendency high; sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies; withheld discovery hints: generic_membrane_without_explicit_topology. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V71 E66 metadata context marks: assembly_context oligomer_context partner_copy_context. Known E66 words are allowed; candidate E67 labels are withheld from prediction. generic membrane or hydrophobicity-only signal is not topology evidence. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: generic membrane or hydrophobicity signal withheld from topology evidence
public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context

v71_context_policy.context_derivation: V71 E66 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. E66-known words are allowed; candidate E67 words are withheld from prediction context so V71 can discover them.
reasons: generic membrane or hydrophobicity signal withheld from topology evidence
public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context
